en_title: Fallout Season 3: Todd Howard Teases 'New Things' Never Seen Before in the Games
cn_title: 陶德·霍华德称《辐射》第三季将现游戏未见之景
subtitle: 废土新惊喜
opus_summary: 陶德·霍华德透露《辐射》第三季将前往游戏未出现的新地点，本月在洛杉矶开拍。剧集延续第二季结局，尸鬼前往科罗拉多，但旅程不会一帆风顺。联合主创表示游戏的地域特色启发了新一季，粉丝可以期待大量惊喜和正史扩展。

paragraphs.en: Bethesda development chief Todd Howard has confirmed a few surprises for Fallout fans in the upcoming Season 3 of the TV show — including some things never seen before in the video games.
paragraphs.cn: B社开发主管陶德·霍华德确认，即将到来的《辐射》真人剧第三季将为粉丝带来一些惊喜——包括一些在游戏中从未见过的东西。

paragraphs.en: Speaking to Entertainment Weekly , Howard said pre-production was underway on Season 3, which “is gonna start shooting soon.” Shooting in fact begins this month in Los Angeles.
paragraphs.cn: 在接受《娱乐周刊》采访时，霍华德表示第三季的前期制作正在进行中，「很快就会开拍」。事实上，拍摄将于本月在洛杉矶开始。

paragraphs.en: Amazon has announced a number of actors joining the cast for Season 3 , including Manny Jacinto from Star Wars show The Acolyte, Thomasin McKenzie from Jojo Rabbit, Emily Mortimer from The Newsroom, and . Howard described Paul as “a Fallout fan from way back.”
paragraphs.cn: 亚马逊已宣布多位演员加入第三季阵容，包括来自《星球大战》剧集《侍者》的Manny Jacinto、来自《乔乔的异想世界》的Thomasin McKenzie、来自《新闻编辑室》的Emily Mortimer，以及. 霍华德形容Paul是「一个老辐射粉丝」。

paragraphs.en: Of most interest, though, is Howard’s tease about where Season 3 is going.
paragraphs.cn: 最令人感兴趣的，是霍华德关于第三季走向的暗示。

paragraphs.en: Warning! Spoilers for Fallout Season 2 finale follow…
paragraphs.cn: 警告！以下包含《辐射》第二季结局的剧透……

paragraphs.en: The ending of Fallout Season 2 sets up Colorado as the location for Season 3, with The Ghoul, played by Walton Goggins, already on his way.
paragraphs.cn: 《辐射》第二季结局将科罗拉多州设定为第三季的地点，由Walton Goggins扮演的尸鬼已经在路上了。

paragraphs.en: In a February interview with IGN , co-showrunner Geneva Robertson-Dworet discussed where Season 3 was heading, at least initially. “We want to remind viewers that just because The Ghoul is heading to Colorado, of course this is the Wasteland where you always get sidetracked by bullshit every goddamn time,” she said. “So how long will it take him to get there, or will he get there in the first episode of the next season? We will have to wait to find out. It may not be as linear a journey as one would hope.”
paragraphs.cn: 联合剧集主创 Geneva Robertson-Dworet 在二月接受 IGN 采访时谈到了第三季的走向，至少是初步构思。「我们想提醒观众，食尸鬼虽然正前往科罗拉多，可这毕竟是废土，你每次都会被一堆破事拖住脚步。」她说，「所以他到底要花多久才能到那儿，或者第三季第一集就能抵达？我们得等着瞧。这趟旅程可能不会像大家期望的那样线性推进。」

paragraphs.en: Howard echoed Robertson-Dworet’s comment, adding: “Yeah, look, there's a lot of surprises coming. We talk about it a lot. And so what I'd say is geography plays such a part into the world of Fallout, and seeing what's there. And there's a lot of land out there, there's a lot of places to explore yet. It's exciting for us to do that in games. And it's really exciting to do it in a TV show where we can jump locations. I wouldn't presume too much yet, I know we're hinting at stuff, but there's a lot of surprises to come.”
paragraphs.cn: 陶德·霍华德也附和了 Robertson-Dworet 的说法，并补充道：「对，你瞧，接下来会有很多惊喜。我们聊了很多。我想说的是，地理在《辐射》的世界里十分重要，能带出很多看点。外面还有大片土地，有很多地方等着我们去探索。在游戏里做这些让我们很兴奋，在剧集里更让人兴奋，因为我们可以跳跃地点。我现在不会做过多的预设，我知道我们在暗示一些东西，但接下来的惊喜还多着呢。」

paragraphs.en: Howard doubled down on this sentiment while speaking to Entertainment Weekly, teasing that Season 3 will visit locations that have never been in the Fallout games.
paragraphs.cn: 霍华德在接受《娱乐周刊》采访时再次强调了这一看法，并透露第三季将造访《辐射》游戏中从未出现过的地点。

paragraphs.en: "We talked about this at the end of Season 2, hinting we're going to new places," Howard said. "So one of the things that we all love about Fallout is the geography of the world and being able to show some new things in the Fallout world that I think will surprise people, that they've never seen before in the games."
paragraphs.cn: 霍华德说：「我们在第二季结尾时提到过，暗示会前往新地点。我们大家之所以喜爱《辐射》，一大原因就是这个世界的地理环境，而这次我们能在《辐射》的世界里展示一些全新的东西，我觉得这些内容会让人感到惊喜，是玩家在游戏里从未见过的。」

paragraphs.en: In February, Robertson-Dworet said the decision to head to a brand new location for Season 3 was inspired by the Fallout video games, which are typically each set in a different location. Fallout 3, for example, is set in the Capital Wasteland, a post-apocalyptic version of the city of Washington and the surrounding areas. Fallout: New Vegas is set in the Mojave Wasteland, which includes post-apocalyptic Las Vegas. Fallout 4 is set in the Commonwealth, which takes in the surrounding area of Boston, Massachusetts. And Fallout 76 is set in Appalachia, although updates have expanded its borders.
paragraphs.cn: 今年二月，Robertson-Dworet 曾表示，第三季前往一个全新地点的决定是受到了《辐射》游戏的启发，因为每代游戏的故事通常都发生在一个不同的地点。比如《辐射3》的舞台是首都废土，即后末日版的华盛顿特区及其周边；《辐射：新维加斯》的背景是莫哈维废土，包含后末日版拉斯维加斯；《辐射4》的故事发生在联邦，涵盖马萨诸塞州波士顿附近的区域；而《辐射76》则设置在阿帕拉契亚，尽管后续更新扩大了其边界。

paragraphs.en: Indeed, one of the thrills of playing a new Fallout game is discovering and exploring a post-apocalyptic take on a brand new location, and getting to see how it's doing hundreds of years after the bombs fell. This, Robertson-Dworet said, influenced the showrunners' thinking.
paragraphs.cn: 事实上，每款新的《辐射》游戏带来的一个兴奋点，就是发现并探索一个全新地点的后末日面貌，看看在核弹落下的数百年后那里变成了什么样子。Robertson-Dworet 说，这一点影响了剧集主创们的思路。

paragraphs.en: “Well, it came out of many conversations about how the games are of course regional. One of the delights of finding out there's going to be a new Fallout game is immediately the question of like, well, where is it going to be set? And of course, our first season being LA, second season being New Vegas, we were excited to go to fresh snow.”
paragraphs.cn: 「这个想法源于许多关于游戏地域性的讨论。得知要推出新的《辐射》游戏，其中一个乐趣就是大家马上会问：背景会设在哪里？当然，我们的第一季在洛杉矶，第二季在新维加斯，我们也很兴奋能前往一片全新的雪地。」

paragraphs.en: The snowy peaks of post-apocalyptic Colorado have yet to be explored by the mainline Fallout video games ( , codenamed “Van Buren”), so everything will feel brand new to an army of Fallout fans, and we can expect a significant expansion of the Fallout canon. The Fallout TV show is set after all the games, but are within the Fallout timeline and are canon. So everything we see in the show continues the overarching Fallout storyline.
paragraphs.cn: 后末日科罗拉多的雪山尚待《辐射》主机游戏正传探索（此前曾有一个代号「Van Buren」的项目），因此对大批《辐射》粉丝来说一切都将是全新的，我们也完全可以期待《辐射》系列正史得到大幅扩展。《辐射》剧集的时间线设定在所有游戏之后，但处于《辐射》时间线内且属于正史。因此，我们在剧中看到的一切都延续着《辐射》的总体故事线。

paragraphs.en: We’ve got plenty more on Fallout, including our Fallout Season 2 finale review , and an explainer on how the post-credits scene at the end of Fallout Season 2 teases something huge from the games . Oh, and here’s what that Amazon Fallout countdown turned out to be .
paragraphs.cn: 我们还有大量《辐射》相关内容，包括我们对《辐射》第二季大结局的评测，以及一篇解析文章，探讨第二季末尾的片尾彩蛋如何预示了游戏中的重大事件。哦对了，还有那个亚马逊《辐射》倒计时的最终结果。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在X上找到他，账号是@wyp100。联系Wesley可发邮件至wesley_yinpoole@ign.com，或保密邮箱wyp100@proton.me。

manual_approved_issues.detail: source contains 'Bethesda', but required dictionary translation 'B社/贝塞斯达' is missing
